column3: "Lavender promotes relaxation" refers to its ability to ease anxiety and stress, making a person feel calm and peaceful.
"Lavender reduces stress levels" refers to its ability to help people feel calmer and more relaxed because it's known for having a soothing aroma.
"Lavender improves sleep quality" refers to its effect on bettering one's ability to get good rest at night.
"Lavender relieves headaches" refers to its ability to ease pain associated with this condition when used as a natural remedy.
"Lavender alleviates migraines" refers to its ability to ease the symptoms of headaches or migraine attacks when used.
"Lavender eases muscle tension" refers to its capability of relaxing tight muscles by using its natural properties.
"Lavender calms the nervous system" refers to its soothing impact on the body's central nervous system.
"Lavender soothes skin irritation" refers to its ability to reduce redness and itchiness.
"Lavender supports immune function" refers to its ability to improve overall health and immunity by using essential oils extracted from its flower buds or whole plant.
"Lavender reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to lessen or relieve swelling or soreness, typically due to some type of injury.
